---
title: "Jacqueline Wu"
about:
  template: trestles
  image: profile_picture.jpg # Make sure your photo is in the project folder!
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://linkedin.com/in/wu-jacqueline
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/wadubes
---

Welcome to my portfolio! I am a current student at UCLA studying Economics. 
Check out my About page to learn more about my background.
